title: Life OS & Second Brain — Ultimate Notion Template
description:
Stop letting great ideas, important tasks, and meaningful goals slip through the cracks. Life OS & Second Brain is an all-in-one Notion template that transforms your chaotic digital life into a single, beautifully connected operating system.

Built for knowledge workers, students, and ambitious self-improvers, this template gives you 10 fully structured, interlinked databases — covering Projects, Tasks, Goals, Notes, a personal Library, Life Areas, Daily Journal, Habit Tracking, Weekly Reviews, and Finance — all wired together so nothing gets lost.

Connect your daily to-dos directly to your quarterly goals. Turn book highlights into permanent, searchable knowledge. Review your week in minutes with a structured template. Track habits, mood, sleep, and energy alongside your work.

Whether you're a busy professional juggling five apps, a graduate student trying to connect learning to output, or an entrepreneur building a system for long-term growth — this template is your unfair advantage. Duplicate it once, customize it to your life, and never start from scratch again.
features: 10 fully interlinked databases — Projects, Tasks, Goals, Notes, Library, Life Areas, Journal, Habits, Weekly Reviews, and Finance — all connected so your whole life is in one place.
Goal-to-task alignment system that links every daily action directly to your quarterly and life goals, so you always know why your work matters.
A true Second Brain knowledge base with Literature Notes, Permanent Notes, and Maps of Content, making every book, article, and idea permanently searchable and actionable.
Structured Daily Journal and Weekly Review templates with mood, energy, gratitude, and priority tracking to keep you consistently reflective and focused.
Pre-built Habit Tracker with streak tracking, frequency settings, and links to goals and life areas — so your daily routines are always connected to your bigger vision.

faq.q: Do I need to be a Notion expert to use this template?
faq.a: Not at all. The template is designed for users ranging from Notion beginners to power users. Everything is pre-built and ready to use the moment you duplicate it into your workspace. A getting-started guide is included to walk you through each section.

faq.q: Do I need a paid Notion plan?
faq.a: Most features work perfectly on Notion's free plan. However, if you want to use relation and rollup columns across more than one workspace member, a Notion Plus plan may be required. For personal use, the free plan is fully sufficient.

faq.q: Can I customize the template to fit my own life and workflow?
faq.a: Absolutely — and that's the whole point. Every database, column, tag, and life area is fully editable. You can rename life areas, add custom tags, remove databases you don't need, and adapt the system to match exactly how you think and work.
